texts.desc:
You can only activate 1 card with this card’s name per turn.
(1) When this card resolves, you can add 1 “Unchained” Spell except “Reincarnation of the Unchained” or 1 “Abomination’s Prison” from your Deck to your hand.
(2) Once per turn: You can target up to 3 “Unchained” cards in your GY, except “Reincarnation of the Unchained”; shuffle them into the Deck, then you can destroy other cards you control up to the number shuffled.
texts.name: Reincarnation of the Unchained
